title: Looking for programmer to create and API between Lightspeed shopping cart and monday.com
excerpt: Hi!  I am looking for someone to develop and API to integrate my ecom shopping cart (Lightspeed) with monday.com.  Anyone have any recs?

posts.author: abbiebailey (abbie bailey)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I am looking for someone to develop and API to integrate my ecom shopping cart (Lightspeed) with monday.com. Anyone have any recs?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @abbiebailey - Welcome to the community! Before we became certified monday․com partners, Polished Geek spent many years as a custom development firm. My entire team has years of eCommerce and API dev experience and would love to help you build an amazing integration for your store with monday․com. If you would like to schedule a free consultation to discuss your project, you can book one here: https://meet.polishedgeek.com/more-with-monday

I look forward to connecting!

~ Deb Cinkus, PMP
Certified monday․com Partner
